rationale: Obligation requires proving post1_self_ == post2_self_ for HashMap<V>, which is #[verifier(external_body)] with uninterp view(). View-equality (post1_self_@ == post2_self_@) is provable but does NOT imply value-equality without an external axiom. Tried ==, =~=, broadcast use vstd::map::group_map_axioms, and view-equality first then ==; all fail. This is fundamentally unprovable in Verus for opaque external_body types without assume(), which is forbidden.
